subcodes.first_line: O my God, my Lord! Thou beholdest souls attracted by the fragrances of the gardens of Thy sanctified Kingdom and gladdened by the verses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی تری نفوسا منجذبه بنفحات حدائق ملکوت تقدیسک و منشرحه بایات
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @spiritual transformation, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @chastisement and requital, @love of God
